creator: empty.japan
caption:
No matter how well planned your trip is, things can go wrong... And just when you think it can’t get any worse, something truly amazing can happen 🥹
That is exactly what happened during Obon festival in 2022 and I will never forget that day. During Obon, ancestors’ spirits come back to our world to visit their homes and families, but on the last day they go back, led by hundreds of lanterns floating down the river. At this exact moment, just when the first lanterns began their journey, a huge thunderstorm has begun. It felt so mysterious, as if the spirits wanted to stay in our world a little longer 🥹 
At the end, the ceremony took place anyway and the lanterns’ lights safely guided the spirits home.
At the same time, 5 huge bonfires are lit on the mountains of Kyoto for the same purpose, signifying the moment when the spirits are returning back to the spirit world. 
In last video you can see one of them, that looks like a Shrine Gate ⛩️
Obon takes place every year in mid August.
